zh.lifeSummary: Anne Smyth是Robert Smyth和Annes Ballarde的女兒，於1526年出生在英國越可爾。她和Sir John Yorke至少有10個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於1575年8月21日享年49歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可倫敦 聖 斯蒂芬 沃爾布盧可 煙雨 聖 貝尼特 黑雷格。

nameMeanings.name: Smyth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Ronan, Aidan, Brigid, Conor, Eoin, Malachy, Paddy.
English: variant of   Smith  . This form of the surname is particularly common Ireland.

variants.name: Smith
meanings: English and Scottish: occupational name denoting a worker in metal, especially iron, such as a blacksmith or farrier, from Middle English smith ‘smith’ (Old English smith, probably a derivative of smītan ‘to strike, hammer’). Early examples are also found in the Latin form Faber . Metal-working was one of the earliest occupations for which specialist skills were required, and its importance ensured that this term and its equivalents in other languages were the most widespread of all occupational surnames in Europe. Medieval smiths were important not only in making horseshoes, plowshares, and other domestic articles, but above all for their skill in forging swords, other weapons, and armor. This is also the most frequent of all surnames in the US. It is very common among African Americans and Native Americans (see also 5 below). This surname (in any of the two possible English senses; see also below) is also found in Haiti. See also Smither .

English: from Middle English smithe ‘smithy, forge’ (Old English smiththe). The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived in or by a blacksmith's shop, occupational, for someone who worked in one, or habitational, from a place so named, such as Smitha in King's Nympton (Devon). Compare Smithey .
Irish and Scottish: sometimes adopted for Gaelic Mac Gobhann, Irish Mac Gabhann ‘son of the smith’. See McGowan .

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: Anne Smyth was born in 1526, in Yorkshire, England as the daughter of Robert Smyth and Annes Ballarde. She had at least 10 sons and 4 daughters with Sir John Yorke. She died on 21 August 1575, at the age of 49, and was buried in London St Stephen Walbrook with St Benet Sherehog, Middlesex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Smythは1526年にイギリスヨークシュアイアでRobert SmythとAnnes Ballardeの娘として生まれた。彼女はSir John Yorkeとの間に少なくとも10人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1575年8月21日に49歳で死去し，イギリスミッドレセックスロンドン スト ステフン ワルブルーク ウィス スト ベンエット シェレhオグにて埋葬された。

ko.St Stephen Walbrook, London, England: 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 스티븐 월브룩 위스 스트 베넷 셔호그
ko.lifeSummary: Anne Smyth(은)는 1526년 영국 요르크실르에서 Robert Smyth(와)과 Annes Ballarde의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Sir John Yorke(와)과 적어도 열 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1575년 8월 21일 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 스티븐 월브룩 위스 스트 베넷 셔호그에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Anne Smyth родилась в 1526 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. Её родителей звали Robert Smyth и Annes Ballarde. У неё было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 4 дочери от Sir John Yorke. Она умерла 21 августа 1575 г. в возрасте 49 лет и была похоронена в местности лондон ст стифен валбрук вит ст бинет ширэог, миддлесекс, Англия.
